category_sources: source_facts.description says professional grade Roblox development tools; official Rojo homepage describes professional development tools in Roblox.
display_name_sources: official homepage and repository use Rojo as the project name; source_facts.name is rojo.

tags_sources: official homepage describes Roblox development tooling; official README says Rojo enables filesystem workflows, Git versioning, real-time streaming, packaging, and CLI deployment.
